title: Slowfall Counter
description: Starts a 30 second countdown after hitting a player with an arrow of slowfalling.
body:
A simple mod designed to help players remember how much time is remaining on their opponents slowfall effect.

After shooting a player with an Arrow of Slowfalling a timer will begin at the top left of your screen(location is configureable, see below.) that counts down from 30 seconds.

**Commands:**

/sf movedown _(Moves timer down by 10 pixels)_

/sf moveup _(Moves timer up by 10 pixels)_

/sf moveleft _(Moves timer left by 10 pixels)_

/sf moveright _(Moves timer right by 10 pixels)_

/sf reset _(Resets timer location)_

/sf size _(Changes size of timer)_

/sf togglealert _(Disables sound notifications)_

[Image of commands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e428f9120c79b573342674ee46bfde8b57f7b3a_0.webp)
